schema_version.description: SemVer of the Contrail spec this claim conforms to

id.description: ULID — 26-character Crockford base32, sortable by creation time

subject.description: Who/what this claim is about. Default 'self' for personal claims.

predicate.description: Namespaced key: category.subcategory.key (1-4 segments, lowercase + underscore)

value.description: The claim's content. Shape depends on value_type.

value_type.description: Hint for consumers about the value's structure

confidence.description: Certainty of the source at the moment of writing. No monotonicity required.

valid_from.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this claim became current

valid_until.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this claim ceased to be current. null = still current.

supersedes.description: ULID of the claim this one replaces. Forms the Trajectory chain.

tool.description: Free-form tool/system identifier that wrote this claim

session_id.description: Opaque session identifier from the writing tool

kind.description: How the claim was produced — closed enum for filterable provenance

visibility.description: Label only — not enforced by Contrail

signature.description: Reserved for Ed25519 signature in v0.2+. Unimplemented in v0.1 — do not rely on this field.
